programmes.show_description: Tracie Andrews & Mike Gifford-Hull. What exposed Tracie Andrews' lie that a road rage attack killed her lover? Mike Gifford-Hull's TV plea for his missing wife Farsi hides the truth. S2, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Boris Johnson: A Faking It Special
programmes.show_description: Experts analyse the former Prime Minister's colourful past and complicated relationship with the truth. Was his career littered with lies?

programmes.show_name: On the Case with Paula Zahn

programmes.show_name: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programmes.show_description: In 2005, a woman is reported missing when she fails to show up at a Motley Crue concert. To this day, her friends and family wait for her killer to visit her secret grave. S2, Ep4
